evals.name: state-as-url
evals.prompt: Create a search component with category filters for a product list.
evals.expected_output: Syncing filter state with URL search params (e.g., using useSearchParams).

evals.name: cls-zero-integrity
evals.prompt: Build an image gallery that loads data from an API.
evals.expected_output: Use of explicit aspect-ratio containers or skeletons to prevent Layout Shift.

evals.name: hydration-hygiene
evals.prompt: Show the current local time in a Next.js client component.
evals.expected_output: Use of useEffect/mounted state to prevent hydration mismatch.
